problem id: d6f4e854
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00100111 -> 00111010
  00111000 -> 11000011
  10111110 -> 11111011
  01111101 -> 11101111
  00001101 -> 01101000
  11010001 -> 10000101
  11011001 -> 11000101
  01011110 -> 11110101
  01100010 -> 00010110

query: 11100100
predicted answer: 00101110
